raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "p must be a point with numeric coordinates",
    "q must be a point with numeric coordinates",
    "p and q must have the same number of coordinates"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is a non-negative number",
    "the result is the Euclidean distance between p and q"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "p and q are the same point",
    "p or q has zero coordinates",
    "p or q has a very large number of coordinates",
    "p or q has non-numeric coordinates"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "p must be a list of two numbers",
    "q must be a list of two numbers"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "The function returns a non-negative number",
    "The function returns the Euclidean distance between points p and q"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "If p or q is not a list, the function raises a TypeError",
    "If p or q has less than two elements, the function raises a ValueError",
    "If p or q contains non-numeric values, the function raises a TypeError"
  ]
}
```

```json
    "If p or q contains non-numeric values, the function raises a TypeError"
  ]
}
```
